mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_tokens (token, username, expires_at) VALUES (#{token}, #{username}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT username FROM user_tokens WHERE token = #{token} AND expires_at >= NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE user_tokens SET expires_at = #{expiresAt} WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_tokens WHERE expires_at < NOW()
